home.title: Write it once. Send it with confidence.
home.description: reWrite rewrites, proofreads and distills whatever you're typing — right where you type it. No pasting into a chatbot. No tab-switching.

contact.title: Contact us | reWrite
contact.description: Get in touch with the reWrite team.

pricing.title: Pricing | reWrite
pricing.description: Simple plans for reWrite. Start free with 50 rewrites a month, upgrade for custom skills and higher limits.

hero.kicker: A writing assistant that lives in one hotkey
hero.titleLead: Write it once. Send it with
hero.leadBefore: reWrite rewrites, proofreads and distills whatever you're typing, right where you type it.
hero.leadBold: No pasting into a chatbot. No tab-switching.
hero.leadAfter: Just press the key and keep going.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.promptIdle: Highlight any part of the text below — a reWrite bubble appears. Click it, choose a skill, and the draft is rewritten for you.
howItWorks.draft: hey so i went over the numbers from last quater and honestly its looking pretty good, we definately beat the target and i think we should tell the team soon, maybe in the meeting tommorow

proofread.label: Proofread
proofread.after: Hey, so I went over the numbers from last quarter and honestly it's looking pretty good. We definitely beat the target, and I think we should tell the team soon — maybe in the meeting tomorrow.

polish.label: Polish
polish.after:
Hi team,

I've had a chance to review last quarter's numbers, and the results are strong — we comfortably beat our target. I'd love to walk everyone through the details at tomorrow's meeting.

summarise.label: Summarise
summarise.note: A wall of text → the essentials
summarise.after: Last quarter beat target. Sharing the details at tomorrow's meeting.

enhance.label: Enhance
enhance.note: Thin and flat → sharp and convincing
enhance.after: I've finished reviewing last quarter's performance, and the numbers are genuinely encouraging: we beat our target with room to spare. That's a result worth sharing with the whole team, so I'd like to walk everyone through the highlights at tomorrow's meeting.

statement.before: You already know what you want to say. reWrite just makes sure it

capabilities.heading: Four things,
capabilities.sub: Fire up reWrite, pick a behaviour, and watch the magic.

items.title: Catch
items.body: Spelling, grammar, doubled words, stray punctuation. Fixed quietly, with your tone and wording left exactly as you wrote them.

items.title: Ready to
items.body: Turn a rushed draft into something you can put in front of a colleague, client, or manager. Clearer, tighter, and professional without losing your meaning.

items.title: Find the
items.body: Drop in a wall of meeting notes and get back the few lines that actually matter, decisions, deadlines, and asks intact.

items.title: Say
items.body: Take a thin, underdeveloped draft and give it depth. Weak points get sharper and the argument reads as complete, without inventing facts you never gave it.

skills.heading: Introducing
skills.sub: Build the writing assistant that actually sounds like you.

items.title: Teach it once,
items.body: Show reWrite your tone, your brand voice, your preferred style. It carries that into every rewrite from here on.

items.title: One skill
items.body: A formal report calls for a different voice than a Slack message or a campaign summary. Write a skill for each and let reWrite handle the rest. Try it above — toggle a few on, or create one of your own.

skillsApp.title: Skills
skillsApp.subtitle: Teach re:Write the voice you want. Toggle to show or hide in the overlay.

modal.title: New skill
modal.baseHint: Your instructions stack on top of the selected base skill.
modal.instructionsPlaceholder: Describe how this skill should rewrite text…

proofread.name: Proofread
proofread.desc: Fix spelling and grammar while preserving your tone and voice.

polish.name: Polish
polish.desc: Turn a rushed draft into something clear, tight, and ready to send.

summarise.name: Summarise
summarise.desc: Condense the text into concise bullet points.

enhance.name: Enhance
enhance.desc: Give a thin draft depth without inventing facts you never gave it.

beef.name: Beef It Up
beef.desc: Take this text and write me a mail. You need to beef up my email with more information. For complex portions, please break it

jp.name: Translate to Japanese
jp.desc: Please help me to rewrite the following text in Japanese. The setting of the Japanese language should be formal business. After

ecom.name: E-Commerce Speak
ecom.desc: #I want you to take this text and rewrite it in a way that is suitable for eCommerce/marketing use. #The text should be catchy,

theLoop.heading: Delete the
theLoop.sub: The old way takes seven steps and three apps. reWrite is one; and you never leave the cursor you were already in.
steps: Write the draft in your email
Open a chatbot in another tab

footer.tagline: Confident writing, one hotkey away. Works wherever you type.

heading.lead: Start free. Pay only if you

pricing.subhead: Every plan runs on the same rewriting engine. What changes is how often you can call on it, and how far you can shape it to sound like you.

pro.name: Pro
features: Custom Skills — teach reWrite tones of your own, so it writes the way you actually do

pricing.note: A rewrite is counted each time reWrite generates a result, whether from a built-in capability or a custom skill. Re-running on the same text counts as a new rewrite. Limits reset on your billing date.
